title: [AI5] Optimize Agent Prompt Token Efficiency
summary: Added a deterministic frontload token-budget report to `tnf-onboard`. The report separates eager Turn Zero context from deferred reference context and recommends staged reading when the complete frontload packet exceeds the configured budget.

checks.notes: Reported eager Turn Zero packet: 1677 words, deferred reference context: 4263 words, full frontload packet: 6047 words (~8043 rough tokens), mode: staged-read recommended.

runtime_contract.staging_rule: Read eager Turn Zero packet first; defer resource map, workflow guide, onboarding guide, and ledger until task selection requires them.
